content.query:
SELECT          OH.CUNO AS [Customer ID]
,               CM.CUNM AS [Customer Name]
,               OH.ORNO AS [Sales Order]
,               OH.CUOR AS [Customer PO]
,               OH.ORDT AS [Order Date]
,               OH.RGDT AS [Entry Date]
,               OH.RLDT AS [Requested Delivery Date]
,               OH.ORTP AS [Order Type]
,               OH.SMCD AS [Salesperson]
,               OH.RESP AS [Responsible]
,               OL.PONR AS [Line Number]
,               OL.ORST AS [Line Status]
,               OL.ITNO AS [Item Number]
,               IM.ITDS AS [Item Description]
,               IM.BUAR AS [Business Area]
,               IM.ITCL AS [Brand]
,               IM.ITGR AS [Category]
,               IM.PDLN AS [Sub Category]
,               IM.PRGP AS [Procurement Group]
,               IM.SUNO AS [Supplier ID]
,               SM.SUNM AS [Supplier Name]
,               OL.WHLO AS Warehouse
,               OL.ORQT AS [Order Qty]
,               OL.NEPR AS [Unit Price]
,               OL.ORQT*OL.NEPR AS [Sales Amt]
,               OL.UCOS AS [Unit Cost]
,               OL.ORQT*OL.UCOS AS [Cost Amt]
,               ODL.DLIX AS [Delivery Number]
,               ODL.IVNO AS [Invoice Number]
,               ODH.IVDT AS [Invoice Date]    
,               ODL.IVQT AS [Invoiced Qty]
FROM            M3_OOHEAD OH
JOIN            M3_OOLINE OL ON OH.ORNO = OL.ORNO
JOIN            M3_MITMAS IM ON OL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
JOIN            M3_OCUSMA CM ON OH.CUNO = CM.CUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3_CIDMAS SM ON OL.SUNO = SM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN       M3_ODLINE ODL ON OH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND OL.PONR = ODL.PONR
LEFT JOIN       M3_ODHEAD ODH ON OH.ORNO = ODH.ORNO AND ODL.DLIX = ODH.DLIX
